steps.title: Read the incorporated column
steps.content: The question asks for the occupational field with the highest incorporated self-employment rate. The relevant comparison is only the incorporated self-employment rate for each field, not the unincorporated rate.

steps.title: Compare the listed rates
steps.content: Choice A is 5.8%, Choice B is 2.7%, and Choice C is 4.4% in the incorporated self-employment column. Each is lower than the 8.9% rate for management, business, and financial services occupations. The highest listed incorporated rate identifies the correct field. The answer is D.
